status: AUTHORITATIVE — NV class spec (grade mapping) + NV Pay Policy 01 Classified schedule (eff 2025-07-07)
administering_agency: Nevada Department of Employment, Training and Rehabilitation (DETR)
bureau: Rehabilitation Division / Bureau of Disability Adjudication
salary_schedule_title: Nevada Compensation Schedule, Pay Policy 01 (Classified; Employee/Employer Contribution Plan EE/ER), Effective July 7, 2025
bargaining_status: AFSCME Local 4041 (NSEA); first formal NV public-sector DDS CBA ratified Aug 2024 (per AB 271, 2019). NV publishes statewide classified compensation schedules; the figures here are the standard Pay Policy 01 EE/ER schedule.
step_basis: annual (NV publishes biweekly/monthly/semimonthly/annual per grade-step; min = step 1, max = step 10). Figures = Annual column.
pay_plan_note: NV has multiple compensation plans by retirement-contribution election: Pay Policy 01 'Employee/Employer Contribution' (EE/ER, used here, the standard/higher base) and Pay Policy 02 'Employer Paid Contribution' (EPC, lower base). Several CBU-specific variants (01A/E/F/I, 01C/L/M/N/O, 01G, 01H/K) also exist. The base statewide Pay Policy 01 EE/ER schedule was used; the grade-32 min/max here exactly matches an official NEATS Disability Adjudicator 3 job announcement ($56,689.20-$83,666.16), confirming the plan choice.

Disability Adjudicator Trainee.basis: Authoritative — grade 30 from official NV class spec; min/max are grade-30 step1/step10 Annual on NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) eff 2025-07-07, read directly from the schedule PDF.

Disability Adjudicator I.basis: Authoritative — grade 31 from official NV class spec; grade-31 step1/step10 on NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) eff 2025-07-07.

Disability Adjudicator II.basis: Authoritative — grade 32 from official NV class spec; grade-32 step1/step10 on NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) eff 2025-07-07. Cross-checked against an official NEATS Disability Adjudicator 3 job announcement showing $56,689.20-$83,666.16 for grade 32.

Disability Adjudicator III.basis: Authoritative — grade 33 (journey level) from official NV class spec; grade-33 step1/step10 on NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) eff 2025-07-07.

Disability Adjudication Supervisor.basis: Authoritative — grade 35 (supervisory level) from official NV class spec; grade-35 step1/step10 on NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) eff 2025-07-07.

data_quality_flags.pay_plan_variant_note: Pay Policy 01 EE/ER used; EPC and CBU-specific variants differ
